relationships: kab:Marie la tessuffuɣ aydi-nnes ad yeddu
kab:S wacu-t akka i la tturaren yigerdan-nni﹖
kab:S anda akka i la nteddu tura﹖ S axxam﹖
kab:Tom ed mary la tturaren yiwen n wurar
kab:Ur zmireɣ ara ad amneɣ la d-iḍerru waya
kab:S anda akka i la iteddu﹖
kab:Mary testeɛṛef dakken la tetteg aya
kab:Tom ur la yettnadi ara ɣef wassaɣ
kab:Mary teẓra dakken la tsell i kra
kab:Mary tenna-d dakken la tessefray ad tṛuḥ
kab:D ayyuren aya seg wasmi ay la tessefray mary ad tessikel
kab:Aqcic-nni i la yettmeslayen akked Mary, d Tom
kab:Ur la tessefray ara ad teddu i yiman-nnes
